stats.label: Study pace while working two jobs

items.title: AI Decision Support Systems
items.text: RAG assistants and anomaly detection that clinicians can trace, audit and trust.

items.title: Test Automation & Quality
items.text: Production-grade automated testing for medical device R&D. Quality that holds up in regulated environments.

items.title: Teaching & Explaining Complex Things
items.text: Teaching assistant at Aalto: probability and statistics, classical physics, and electricity and magnetism. I make hard concepts land.

cards.title: THL Health Data ETL
cards.text: Full pipeline on real primary care visit data from THL's Avohilmo API: PostgreSQL staging and analytics layers, Llama 3.1 anomaly detection, Metabase dashboards.

cards.title: Live ECG Analyzer
cards.text: Real-time medical signal processing for cardiac monitoring.

cards.title: GE Healthcare Test Automation
cards.text: Performance and reliability testing for medical devices in R&D. Automated Python and Robot Framework suites, plus a waveform analysis tool I built that is now used in the verification process.

cards.title: Healthcare RAG Assistant
cards.text: Source-traceable answers from clinical care guidelines. Every response cites document and page, with a full audit log for EU AI Act compliance.

items.title: THL Health Data ETL
items.text: A live Metabase dashboard built on five years of real Finnish primary-care data: visit trends, ICD-10 breakdowns, and the AI-flagged anomalies my pipeline detects.

items.title: Healthcare RAG Assistant
items.text: Ask a clinical question and get an answer grounded in Kaypa hoito care guidelines, with the source document and page cited for every claim.
